riskLevel.heading: Risk Level Classification
riskLevel.high: High Risk: ≤60% probability of being worthless
riskLevel.medium: Medium Risk: >60% and <80% probability of being worthless
riskLevel.low: Low Risk: ≥80% probability of being worthless

volatilityAnalysis.title: Financial Reporting Volatility
volatilityAnalysis.subtitle: Stock price behavior during financial reporting days
volatilityAnalysis.filterDesc: Select one or more stocks to analyze (default: all stocks)
volatilityAnalysis.vizDesc: Interactive charts showing price volatility patterns during financial reporting days
volatilityAnalysis.eventDataDesc: Complete event-by-event data with filtering and sorting capabilities

ivAnalysis.title: Implied Volatility History
ivAnalysis.dataSourceNote: Data source: Each day's IV is a constant-maturity 30-day implied volatility computed via variance interpolation across the options term structure, targeting ~21 business days (following the Swedish holiday calendar). Dates with no valid IV data show as "–".

lowerBoundAnalysis.title: Lower Bound Validation Analysis
lowerBoundAnalysis.subtitle: Analyzing IV-based lower bound predictions against historical stock prices
lowerBoundAnalysis.errorDesc: Failed to load lower bound analysis data. Please try refreshing the page.

howToUseSteps.selectStock: Select a stock from the dropdown to view its detailed analysis
howToUseSteps.trendTab: The Trend Analysis tab shows monthly hit rate evolution
howToUseSteps.distributionTab: The Distribution tab displays prediction ranges and breaches
howToUseSteps.statisticsTab: The Statistics tab provides sortable per-expiry metrics

lowerBoundAnalysis.hitRateEvolution: Hit rate evolution by expiry month with prediction volume
lowerBoundAnalysis.predictionDesc: Prediction ranges, span percentages, breach counts, and stock prices
lowerBoundAnalysis.expiryStatsDesc: Click column headers to sort. Hit rate color-coded: green (85%+), blue (75–85%), yellow (65–75%), red (<65%)
